test_cases.name: SW codec (c2.android.*) used instead of HW codec for secondary display

steps.name: Clear logcat

test_cases.name: Frozen frame auto-detected via C2BqBuffer stall

steps.name: Play video on secondary display
steps.action: Start video in any app, wait for it to play on secondary

steps.action: Force-stop the video app while video is playing (adb shell am force-stop)

steps.name: Wait for detection
steps.action: Wait up to 10 seconds for watchdog to detect the stall
steps.expected: Logcat shows C2BqBuffer stall detected or frozen frame watchdog triggered

test_cases.expected_result: Frozen frame condition detected automatically via C2BqBuffer stall monitoring
